user_scenarios.user_goal: As an evaluator, verify expanded AI infrastructure work remains behind every active bounded Worker commit safety gate.
prerequisites: The Supervisor Worker and orchestrator primitive regressions are available.
Tests use temporary repositories and do not restart live services.
steps: Exercise the bounded commit primitive with an explicit Git status failure.
Lease bounded commit actions for denylist, supply-chain, required-evidence, unexpected-dirty, baseline-dirty, and commit-provenance fixtures.
Verify scope runs before supply-chain validation.
Verify no private multi-round runtime is called.
expected_outcomes: Git ownership failure returns a non-success Worker result with explicit evidence.
Every active gate stops the run with its authoritative next action and structured evidence.
Generator-supplied commits are rejected without exact orchestrator state and path provenance.
No live crawler, frontend, dashboard, or Supervisor service is changed.
failure_signals: Git failure is interpreted as a clean worktree.
Denylist, supply-chain, required-evidence, dirty-path, or commit-provenance checks are bypassed.
Supply-chain validation runs before scope validation.
An obsolete smoke or Auditor executable is invoked.
cleanup: Pytest removes all temporary fixture repositories.
